title: Countered's Terrain Slabs
description: A world generation mod that improves the terrain by adding slabs
body:
![Terrain in Cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f75b0b2c2ef167a1a527f54351b4119dd7ae350.jpeg)

## Countered's Terrain Slabs

"Countered's Terrain Slabs" is a Minecraft mod designed to transform your world into a more naturally flowing landscape! This mod enhances the way terrain is generated and experienced by introducing custom slabs that blend seamlessly with the natural world. No more harsh, blocky steps as you traverse the environment—this mod smooths out the rough edges, allowing for a more immersive and enjoyable exploration experience.

***

#### **Features:**

*   **Ground and ceiling slabs:** Slabs are generated throughout the entire chunk, meaning they appear not only on the surface but also within caves, adding a more natural feel to underground exploration.
*   **Variety of Materials:** Slabs are created from various common blocks like dirt, grass, mycelium, moss, gravel, sand, and even special blocks like clay and deepslate. Some are affected by gravity like the blocks they are made from!
*   **No Inventory Junk:** Breaking these custom slabs causes them to drop the block they are made out of, so your inventory isn't full of things you don't want or need!
*   **Config:** Toggle slab generation in the world via embedded Midnightlib - if you only want the slabs 😉
* **Vegetation**: Vegetation and Snow generate on top of slabs!

***

#### **Related Mods**
- Place anything on Slabs with [Slabbed](https://modrinth.com/mod/slabbed)!
- [Biomes O' Plenty & Vibrant Journeys compatibility](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cts-compats)
- Also check out [Countered's Smooth Steps](https://modrinth.com/mod/countereds-smooth-steps) for a smoother experience traversing the terrain!
***

**How It Works:**

The slabs automatically generate in your world alongside your terrain, smoothing out the transitions between different block heights. The goal is to make exploration easier without drastically changing the vanilla Minecraft feel. It bridges the gap between blocky hills and steep cliffs, letting you run up slopes naturally.

**Before:**
![before slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26591073ddb7bc28cca65153850c1ce56cad151c.jpeg)
**After:** 
![after slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f1dfa470e3e983523f3c7b3f01e8799ec2d9d66.jpeg)
***
### **Compatibility**

WARNING: Do not update from a Version below 3.0.0 to a 3.x.x version. All previously generated Slabs will be deleted

**Why are my grass slabs the wrong color?**

You probably have Quark installed. You can fix this problem by disabling "greener grass" in the Quark config (fixed in v3.0.2)

**Why does Distant Horizons show slabs as brown cubes?**

You can partially fix this by using the included resource pack

**Is there a "fancy grass" option for grass slabs?**

Included in the resource pack

***

### **Future Plans**

*   **Additional Slab Types:** We plan to expand the variety of slabs to include more unique terrain and biome-based blocks.
*   **Slab Improvements:** Water running through slabs
*   **LOTS AND LOTS OF BUGFIXES 😅**

***
